tasks.label: Gradle Sync Check
tasks.command: if (Test-Path .\gradlew.bat) { .\gradlew.bat tasks } else { Write-Host 'Missing gradlew.bat. Generate Gradle Wrapper first, or open the project in Android Studio once to initialize the wrapper.'; exit 1 }
tasks.detail: Check whether Gradle and Android plugin resolution are working on this machine.

tasks.label: Assemble Debug APK
tasks.command: if (Test-Path .\gradlew.bat) { .\gradlew.bat assembleDebug } else { Write-Host 'Missing gradlew.bat. Generate Gradle Wrapper first, or open the project in Android Studio once to initialize the wrapper.'; exit 1 }
tasks.detail: Build a debug APK after Android SDK and Gradle repositories are available.
